note: Auto-expanded + re-verified every 6h by .github/workflows/merchant-sync.yml (engine: Test/merchant-expand.cjs). The app fetches this on launch via WFMerchants.syncRemote(), re-verifies every entry against taxonomy.categories, and merges the valid ones into window.WFMerchants. Each entry: {key (lowercase merchant signal), category, goesTo}. Seed registry precedence always wins; this list only adds coverage.
